chunks.text: Tahir Ghani | EECS at UC Berkeley Tahir Ghani: Faculty Home Page Larger Photo Tahir Ghani Visiting Professor Contact Information tahirg@berkeley.edu Links Biography Tahir Ghani is a Senior Intel Fellow and Director of Semiconductor Research. He received his Ph.D. in electrical engineering from Stanford University in 1994. He will be teaching a special course on CMOS scaling in Spring 2026. Education 1994, PhD, Electrical Engineering, Stanford University 1984, BSC, Electrical Engineering, University of Engineering and Technology, Lahore, Pakistan Selected Honors and Awards National Academy of Inventors (NAI) Fellow , 2025
